'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"\/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=HnSlXpVeANJY_HZ1G30_wQrNNZvyT2nDpsNSA89cHak-1773631003-1.0.1.1-iSm04UVzvYnZDTzx171JiW0pI8nAuomNdGFMOQ_7TOw"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
